title: devmate session handshake
$comment: Shared contract for the `.devmate/session.json` handshake between monoroot (producer — writes the file at session create/re-sync) and devmate (consumer — parseSessionHandshake in lib/init/session-handshake.mjs reads the schemaVersion pin and the devmate block; everything else is producer-owned metadata the consumer ignores). Pinned by handshakeVersion (= schemaVersion = 2) in the fixtures corpus at test/fixtures/session-handshake. Both runtime validators are hand-written; this schema documents their intersection, and the corpus is the executable agreement. Keep this file byte-identical between the two repos when the handshake changes.

schemaVersion.description: Session schema version. 2 introduced the devmate block and the bare-filename workspaceFile. The consumer rejects any other value (fail-open: it falls back to config-derived resolution).

devmate.description: The handshake block devmate consumes — a direct pointer to the orchestrator entry point and the merged config, so the consumer never re-derives them.

mode.description: Layout mode. Currently only 'multi-root' is emitted; the consumer rejects anything else.

primary.description: Repo name (matches a worktrees[].name) that acts as the devmate orchestrator entry point.

configPath.description: Path to the merged devmate config, relative to the worktree branch root. The producer writes '.devmate/devmate.config.json'.

branchName.description: Producer-owned session metadata; the consumer ignores it.

createdAt.description: Producer-owned ISO timestamp; the consumer ignores it.

workspaceFile.description: Producer-owned bare filename of the .code-workspace file co-located with the .devmate folder; the consumer ignores it.

worktrees.description: Producer-owned worktree inventory; the consumer ignores it.
